comment:
$$4\sin^3x+4\sqrt{3}(1-\sin^2x)+3\sin x-4\sqrt{3}=0\\ 4\sin^3x+4\sqrt{3}-4\sqrt{3}\sin^2x+3\sin x-4\sqrt{3}=0\\ 4\sin^3x-4\sqrt{3}\sin^2x+3\sin x=0\\ \sin x(4\sin^2x-4\sqrt{3}\sin x+3)=0\\ \sin x(2\sin x-\sqrt{3})^2=0\\ \displaystyle \begin{array}{{>{\displaystyle}l}} \ \ \ \ \ \ \left[ \begin{array}{l l} \sin x=0\\ \sin x=\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2} \end{array} \right.\\ \left[ \begin{array}{l l} x=\pi n,n\in Z\\ x=\frac{\pi }{3} +2\pi n,n\in Z\\ x=\frac{2\pi }{3} +2\pi n,n\in Z \end{array} \right. \end{array}$$
Ответ: \(x=\pi n\), \(n\in Z\); \(x=\frac{\pi}{3}+2\pi n\), \(n\in Z\); \(x=\frac{2\pi}{3}+2\pi n\), \(n\in Z\).
